title: TranslatorRep Data Channel Message (v1)
description: Wire payload for finalized translated Utterances sent over the WebRTC Data Channel between Paired Users. Authority: architecture.md §5 Data Channel Schema. Field naming convention: snake_case (locked). Authorship: Story 1.7 (2026-05-22).

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Receiver MUST silently drop messages with unknown major versions (forward-incompat releases). Adding/removing/renaming a required field bumps this. Adding optional fields does NOT bump it.

seq.description: Monotonic per-sender counter starting at 1 at Call start. Receiver dedup key: (speaker_uid, seq). Receiver renders in seq order (re-orders with ~500ms reorder buffer).

utterance_id.description: ULID identifying the Utterance. 26-character Crockford base32. Time-sortable. Used as CaptionRow stable identity across partial→final transitions.

speaker_uid.description: Firebase Auth anonymous UID of the speaker (the sender of this message).

source_lang.description: BCP 47 language tag of the source text (e.g., 'id-ID', 'en-US'). NEVER use Flores-200 codes here (those are internal to TranslationProvider model calls only).

source_text.description: The speaker's transcribed Source Text from on-device ASR. UTF-8. Bounded by Utterance length (max 15s of speech per FR-12 → typical max ~200 chars).

target_lang.description: BCP 47 language tag of the target text (e.g., 'en-US', 'id-ID').

target_text.description: The translated text. UTF-8. Bounded similarly to source_text. Under render_mode='sundanesePlaceholder', this MAY be a literal '[Sundanese]' placeholder string.

confidence.description: Aggregate confidence score (0.0-1.0). Combines ASR confidence and translation confidence; per-implementation weighting. Optional but recommended; consumers may default to 1.0 when absent.

timestamp_offset_ms.description: Sender's offset (ms) from local call_start_ms (the moment that sender joined the room). NOT wall-clock UTC. Receiver computes display 'X seconds ago' from its own clock; never trusts sender's wall-clock. Ordering uses seq, not timestamps.

translation_status.description: Status enum. Orthogonal to render_mode. 'failed' triggers TranslationUnavailableMarker. 'low-confidence' surfaces inline tertiary marker on the Caption row.

render_mode.description: Rendering hint enum. Orthogonal to translation_status. 'sundanesePlaceholder' triggers SundanesePlaceholderRow on the EN side regardless of translation_status (ParticleProcessor flagged a full Sundanese clause).

particles_preserved.description: List of TQ-1 / TQ-2 / TQ-4 / etc. preserved-particle tokens (e.g., ['kan', 'loh', 'urang']). When non-empty, target_text renders with +0.3pt letter-spacing emotional-weight whisper per UX-DR7. Empty list (or absent) = normal rendering.

call_type.description: CallType the Utterance was captured in. Useful for post-Call analytics and for future-version variants that may render differently in video vs audio. Default 'audio' for legacy messages where field absent.
